allow: Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('import ok'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('Backend imports OK'\)")
PowerShell(gh repo view bayllama/homemaker --json licenseInfo,description,url | ConvertFrom-Json)

PowerShell(& "backend\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; d=Path\('backend/data/3d-front'\); midi=json.loads\(\(d/'midi_room_ids.json'\).read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)\); furn=json.loads\(\(d/'midi_furniture_ids.json'\).read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('rooms type=', type\(midi\).__name__, 'len=', len\(midi\)\); [print\('  ', repr\(x\)\) for x in midi[:5]]; print\('furniture type=', type\(furn\).__name__, 'len=', len\(furn\)\); print\('first entry type=', type\(furn[0]\).__name__\); print\('first entry:', repr\(furn[0]\)[:300]\)")

PowerShell($loc = Get-Location; Write-Output "cwd: $loc"; if \(Test-Path 'backend\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe'\) { Write-Output 'venv python found at backend\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe' } else { Write-Output 'NOT found at backend\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe'; Get-ChildItem backend\\.venv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:5174"; $checks = @\("/3d-front/sample/manifest.json", "/3d-front/sample/wall.glb", "/3d-front/sample/Sofa_07d28f5b-d9e3-43c7-a782-d6a7f8ce4221_2.glb", "/?dev=3dfront"\); foreach \($p in $checks\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$p" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("OK  {0,3}  {1,12}  {2}" -f $r.StatusCode, $r.Headers['Content-Type'], $p\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR       {0}: {1}" -f $p, $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell(Write-Output \(Get-Location\).Path; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem backend\\data 2>&1 | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem frontend\\public\\models 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30 Name)

PowerShell(Set-Location ..; Write-Output \(Get-Location\).Path; Get-ChildItem backend\\data | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---models---"; Get-ChildItem frontend\\public\\models | Select-Object -First 30 Name)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/models/3df/3df_sofa_main.glb" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("OK {0,3}  {1}  size={2}" -f $r.StatusCode, $r.Headers['Content-Type'], $r.Headers['Content-Length']\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR: {0}" -f $_.Exception.Message\) }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/models/sofa_3seat.glb" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("OLD STILL 200 \({0}\) - unexpected" -f $r.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("OK old removed: {0}" -f $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/models/sofa_3seat.glb?_=$\(Get-Random\)" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("OLD STILL 200 - need server restart"\) } catch { Write-Output \("Old GLB 404 \(good\): $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/models/3df/3df_sofa_main.glb?_=$\(Get-Random\)" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("new OK: {0}  {1}" -f $r.StatusCode, $r.Headers['Content-Type']\) } catch { Write-Output \("new ERR: {0}" -f $_.Exception.Message\) }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/models/sofa_3seat.glb?_=$\(Get-Random\)" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("OLD STILL 200 - stale"\) } catch { Write-Output \("old 404 \(good\): {0}" -f $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/3d-front/sample/manifest.json" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("dev viewer assets still served: {0}" -f $r.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("dev viewer ERR: {0}" -f $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/models/this_never_existed_xyz.glb?_=$\(Get-Random\)" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("UNEXPECTED 200"\) } catch { Write-Output \("404 \(expected\): $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"\) }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/models/sofa_3seat.glb?_=$\(Get-Random\)" -Method Get -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("sofa_3seat content-length: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"\) } catch { Write-Output \("sofa_3seat: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"\) })

PowerShell($ports = 8000, 8001, 3000, 5050; foreach \($p in $ports\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \("http://localhost:" + $p + "/"\) -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; Write-Output \("port " + $p + ": " + $r.StatusCode\) } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { Write-Output \("port " + $p + ": " + $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) } else { Write-Output \("port " + $p + ": no listener"\) } } })
Bash(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.domain.presets.layouts import ALL_PRESETS; print\(f'OK — {len\(ALL_PRESETS\)} presets loaded'\)")
